title: Siemens Healthineers India Advisory Limited is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Siemens Healthineers India Advisory Limited is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Consultant Physician with drive and ambition, Siemens Healthineers India Advisory Limited in Allahabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Siemens Healthineers India Advisory Limited:
Siemens Healthineers India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Siemens Healthineers India Advisory Limited!
